1124.issue: [W1124] [io-package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "search.global.query" common.read is mandatory and must be boolean

1125.issue: [W1125] [io-package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "search.global.query" common.write is mandatory and must be boolean

1133.issue: [W1133] [io-package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/io-package.json): instanceObject "search.documents.queryTags" role "value" expects common.type to be one of [number], but found "array"

2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [S3032] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v1.0.0" was found for current release 1.0.0. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/modules/paperlessCommunication.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5063.issue: [W5063] JSON formatting in "admin/jsonConfig.json" is hard to read (mixed indentation). Please use consistent indentation and proper line breaks.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/mainTab/items/token" attribute "tooltip" uses key "tokenTooltip" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6021.issue: [W6021] `## License` is not the last section in [README.md](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/README.md). The license section should be the last section.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#117] "[iobroker-bot] Align @tsconfig/nodeXX with engines.node in [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/package.json)"](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/issues/117)

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/package.json)

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0086.issue: [W0086] "@tsconfig/node20" should match the major node.js version from [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/package.json) engines.node (>=22). Please update to @tsconfig/node22 at [package.json](https://github.com/BenAhrdt/ioBroker.paperless-ngx/blob/master/package.json).

0090.issue: [W0090] "/tsconfig.json" should be adjusted to match "@tsconfig/node22" (for example: "extends": "@tsconfig/node22/tsconfig.json").
